blended.narrative: Ski Granby Ranch is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.7 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,975 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.6" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 44.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 7" over the past week. Current depth: 42".
